title: L2 Activation Contract — Specialist Agents Begin Work
description: L2 is live. All 7 specialist agents activate immediately and begin parallel verification, stress testing, and optimization.

Agent-1B.action: Monitor all L1 agents for conflicts every 60s. Escalate to Agent-1 on L1 port 9000 immediately.

Agent-2B.action: Hit L1 gateway port 8080 with load tests. Target: p95 < 100ms, zero 5xx.

Agent-3B.action: Review dashboard HTML files from L1 commits. Flag layout issues, missing features.

Agent-4B.action: Review DB migration scripts from Agent-4A. Optimize queries, verify zero data loss.

Agent-5B.action: Hammer auth endpoints on L1. Target: 1000 concurrent users, p95 < 200ms.

Agent-6B.action: Continuous soak test on L1 endpoints. Run non-stop Days 2-8. Report every hour.

gate_condition: Day 5: zero conflicts unresolved, soak test green, all L1 gates passed
